newTests.name: should ignore pluginId when remote-href option is provided for multiple summaries
should preserve trailing slash in remote-href option when pluginId is ignored
should ignore pluginId when there is only one summary
should use the base remote-href when the summary directory does not contain index.html
should render View link from remote-href option for every row
should suffix remote-href with the summary directory when index.html is present
should not render View link when neither remote-href option nor summary.remoteHref is set
should fall back to summary.remoteHref when remote-href option is missing
should prefer remote-href option over summary.remoteHref
